title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird founded Koah Labs, an ad monetization platform for AI tools, raising $26M by betting on advertising rather than subscription models. He argues that the real bottleneck for AI agents is human trust adoption, not technology, and that ads can provide better user experiences than subscriptions for AI applications.
